'''Zallakesh''' was a notorious spaceport on [[Chuzalla]].

==History==
The city-port criminal haven acted as a transfer point between the planet [[Tammuz-an/Legends|Tammuz-an]] and a branch of the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]]. A [[Honest Tobar's Used Spacecraft|starship shop]] in the city sold the sleek [[Blackhawk Destroyer]]. The [[Starhunter's Intergalactic Menagerie]] used the port as a stopover upon returning from the outer galaxies, and slave ships from Zallakesh were known on other worlds.

==Inhabitants==
A large, [[Color/Legends|green]] creature was domesticated to be a beast of burden in Zallakesh. During a visit, [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Coby]] had an altercation with an [[Unidentified Ithorian (Zallakesh spaceport)|Ithorian]] who was using one of these creatures as transportation.<ref name="Coby and the Starhunters">{{DroidsCite|Coby and the Starhunters}}</ref>
